cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER BRENDA KNIGHT'S AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FROM THE SUSPENSION OF PETITIONER'S CALIFORNIA DRIVER'S LICENSE. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. THE COURT HAS CONDUCTED AN INDEPENDENT REVIEW OF THE EVIDENCE. THE OFFICER'S STATEMENT ON PAGE 3 OF DS 367 EXPLAINS WHAT HAPPENED AND MAKES CLEAR THAT THE TIME OF 00:46 A.M. WAS WHEN PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE WAS FIRST OBSERVED. THE BOXES CHECKED ON THE FORM REFLECT WHAT HAPPENED THEREAFTER. MOREOVER, THERE IS NOTHING IMPOSSIBLE ABOUT 2 OFFICERS EFFECTING SERVICE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

calendar.matters:
Amended Petition For Writ Of Mandate From The Suspension Of Petitioner'S California Driver'S License;Certified Record
Off Calendar Nov-09-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER BRENDA KNIGHT'S Amended Petition For Writ Of Mandate From The Suspension Of Petitioner's California Driver's License.
APPEARANCES: E. Michael Linscheid, Esq. 782-6002 for petitioner & moving party; David A. Carillo, Deputy Atty General 510/622-2215 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. THE COURT HAS CONDUCTED AN INDEPENDENT REVIEW OF THE EVIDENCE. THE OFFICER'S STATEMENT ON PAGE 3 OF DS 367 EXPLAINS WHAT HAPPENED AND MAKES CLEAR THAT THE TIME OF 00:46 A.M. WAS WHEN PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE WAS FIRST OBSERVED. THE BOXES CHECKED ON THE FORM REFLECT WHAT HAPPENED THEREAFTER. MOREOVER, THERE IS NOTHING IMPOSSIBLE ABOUT 2 OFFICERS EFFECTING SERVICE. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
